query:
SELECT id, title, status, audioUrl, aspectRatio, createdAt
FROM musicVideoJobs 
WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%zara%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%demo%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
